name: Chewy Ginger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and 1 cup of sugar.
2. Add the egg, molasses, and vanilla; mix well.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (remaining sugar, flour, cinnamon, ginger, baking soda, salt, and ground cloves) in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed shortening mixture and mix until combined.
5. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in the remaining sugar.
7. Place the cookies about 1-1/2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Allow to cool on wire racks.
10. Store in an airtight container.
